findings.reviewer_angle: Bootstrap atomicity vs Phase-3 build-plugin idempotency
findings.finding: Phase 1.5 parity enforcement triggers on staged bin/cortex-* paths; plan provides zero analysis of whether new bin/cortex-commit-preflight ↔ skills/commit/SKILL.md pairing satisfies linter contract.
findings.evidence_quote: Phase 1.5 (parity), Phase 1.6 (shim presence), Phase 3 (build-plugin re-run), and Phase 4 (plugin-drift) must all pass on this commit.

findings.reviewer_angle: Bootstrap atomicity vs Phase-3 build-plugin idempotency
findings.finding: Phase 1.6 enforces shim presence within first 50 lines on disk; six drive-by edits asserted line-preserving but never verified to leave shim within window.
findings.evidence_quote: since Task 1 emits the shim within the first 50 lines, this passes.

findings.reviewer_angle: Test verification fragility under realistic implementations
findings.finding: test_shim_records_invocation path coupling unpinned: cortex-log-invocation derives session_dir from $repo_root (test process git toplevel); without explicit cwd=tmp_repo, JSONL lands in cortex-command repo (polluting) instead of tmp fixture.
findings.evidence_quote: set LIFECYCLE_SESSION_ID to a fresh UUID, count records in lifecycle/sessions/<uuid>/bin-invocations.jsonl before invocation (zero), run script, count after, assert delta == 1
